title: aster mollescens
intro: Aster mollescens, also known as Western American Mountain Aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Aster mollescens include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Aster mollescens can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
